productDisplayName: Revlon Touch & Glow Advanced Fairness Face Wash
description: Infused with botanical extract of  "Soapwort" which gently removes dirt, oil & impurities from the    skin,leaving it sparkling cleanContains botanical extract of  "Bearberry" which helps to lighten the complexionEnriched with Vitamins E, C & B5 that moisturises the skin, leaving it soft & suppleContains Witch Hazel extract, a mild astringent, which helps to reduce the size of pores
